title: Happy Easter! The Resurrection of Christ reminds us of the power of...
title_en: Happy Easter! The Resurrection of Christ reminds us of the power of...
title_uk: Щасливого Великодня! Воскресіння Христове нагадує нам про силу...
description: Happy Easter! The Resurrection of Christ reminds us of the power of goodness and truth, which always defeats darkness. Easter morning brings not only joy - it brings hope that evil will surely be defeated, and there will surely be light ahead. May this holiday bring warmth to every family, unite us, give strength and remind us of the value of life and mutual support. Let the light of this day...
description_en: Happy Easter! The Resurrection of Christ reminds us of the power of goodness and truth, which always defeats darkness. Easter morning brings not only joy - it brings hope that evil will surely be defeated, and there will surely be light ahead. May this holiday bring warmth to every family, unite us, give strength and remind us of the value of life and mutual support. Let the light of this day...
description_uk: Зі світлим святом Великодня! Воскресіння Христове нагадує нам про силу добра і правди, які завжди перемагають темряву. Великодній ранок приносить не тільки радість – він приносить надію, що зло неодмінно зазнає поразки, а попереду обов’язково буде світло. Нехай це свято приносить кожній родині тепло, об’єднує нас, дає силу та нагадує про цінність життя та взаємопідтримки. Хай світло цього дня...

title: Kyiv: When we were preparing this year's Easter greeting, we learned that...
title_en: Kyiv: When we were preparing this year's Easter greeting, we learned that...
title_uk: Київ: Готуючи цьогорічне пасхальне привітання, ми дізналися, що...
description: When we were preparing this year's Easter greeting, we learned that very close by, also on the territory of Sofia of Kyiv, at this very time, the children of defenders from Kyiv and the Kyiv region, whose parents, unfortunately, died in this war, gathered. An excursion, a quest with the search for Easter eggs, freckles and groves, master classes on making stained glass for special guests were prepared by the Platform of Socially Responsible Business...
description_en: When we were preparing this year's Easter greeting, we learned that very close by, also on the territory of Sofia of Kyiv, at this very time, the children of defenders from Kyiv and the Kyiv region, whose parents, unfortunately, died in this war, gathered. An excursion, a quest with the search for Easter eggs, freckles and groves, master classes on making stained glass for special guests were prepared by the Platform of Socially Responsible Business...
description_uk: Коли ми готували цьогорічне великоднє привітання, дізналися, що зовсім поряд, теж на території Софії Київської, у цей самий час зібралися діти захисників із Києва й Київщини, чиї батьки, на жаль, загинули на цій війні. Екскурсію, квест із пошуком писанок, веснянками та гаївками, майстер-класи з виготовлення вітражів для особливих гостей підготувала Платформа соціально відповідального бізнесу...

title: Johnson visited the front line in Ukraine and made a strong...
title_en: Johnson visited the front line in Ukraine and made a strong...
title_uk: Джонсон побував на передовій в Україні та зробив сильний...
description: Johnson visited the front line in Ukraine and made a strong statement. The former Prime Minister of Britain visited the positions of the Ukrainian Armed Forces in the Zaporozhye direction and spent about two days there. In his material, he described the front as a "zone of destruction" and criticized the allies' indecision: "We are not providing the Ukrainians with the weapons they need - long-range missiles - to destroy factories...
description_en: Johnson visited the front line in Ukraine and made a strong statement. The former Prime Minister of Britain visited the positions of the Ukrainian Armed Forces in the Zaporozhye direction and spent about two days there. In his material, he described the front as a "zone of destruction" and criticized the allies' indecision: "We are not providing the Ukrainians with the weapons they need - long-range missiles - to destroy factories...
description_uk: Джонсон побывал на передовой в Украине и сделал жёсткое заявление Бывший премьер Британии посетил позиции ВСУ на запорожском направлении и провёл там около двух суток. В своём материале он описал фронт как "зону уничтожения" и раскритиковал нерешительность союзников: "Мы не предоставляем украинцам то вооружение, которое им необходимо - ракеты дальнего действия - для уничтожения заводов по...

title: Shelling near civilians
description: "Dear defenders of Ukraine! For more than one and a half thousand days and nights, the entire Ukrainian people resisted the full-scale Russian onslaught. For more than one and a half thousand days and nights, the aggressor shelled Ukrainian cities and villages. Over the years, millions of Ukrainians learned to live in conditions of war and constant danger. And they learned to especially appreciate festive mornings, days and evenings. Today we celebrate Easter...
description_en: "Dear defenders of Ukraine! For more than one and a half thousand days and nights, the entire Ukrainian people resisted the full-scale Russian onslaught. For more than one and a half thousand days and nights, the aggressor shelled Ukrainian cities and villages. Over the years, millions of Ukrainians learned to live in conditions of war and constant danger. And they learned to especially appreciate festive mornings, days and evenings. Today we celebrate Easter...
description_uk: "Шановні захисники та захисниці України! Понад півтори тисячі днів і ночей весь український народ протистоїть повномасштабній російській навалі. Понад півтори тисячі днів і ночей агресор обстрілює українські міста і села. За ці роки мільйони українців навчилися жити в умовах війни та постійної небезпеки. І навчилися особливо цінувати святкові ранки, дні й вечори. Сьогодні ми відзначаємо Великдень...

title: Kyiv: Drone strike
description: Russian drone strikes ambulance in northeastern Ukraine, injuring 3 paramedics despite Easter ceasefire. A Russian drone struck an ambulance in Sumy Oblast, injuring three paramedics overnight on April 12 despite an Easter ceasefire being in place, local authorities reported.
description_en: Russian drone strikes ambulance in northeastern Ukraine, injuring 3 paramedics despite Easter ceasefire. A Russian drone struck an ambulance in Sumy Oblast, injuring three paramedics overnight on April 12 despite an Easter ceasefire being in place, local authorities reported.
description_uk: Russian drone strikes ambulance in northeastern Ukraine, injuring 3 paramedics despite Easter ceasefire. A Russian drone struck an ambulance in Sumy Oblast, injuring three paramedics overnight on April 12 despite an Easter ceasefire being in place, local authorities reported.

title: Casualties reported
description: 🤬 Katsaps killed a Ukrainian evacuation group near Gulyaipilskyi 🔄 Despite the so-called "ceasefire", the enemy continues what he was doing. Today, around 5:30 p.m. near Gulyaipilskyi, with the use of fpv drones, snipers killed a group of our wounded. 💬 Another illusion of the partners that Moscow wants peace must be shattered. Only by joint power, and not by playing along, can you make the bastards sit down for...
description_en: 🤬 Katsaps killed a Ukrainian evacuation group near Gulyaipilskyi 🔄 Despite the so-called "ceasefire", the enemy continues what he was doing. Today, around 5:30 p.m. near Gulyaipilskyi, with the use of fpv drones, snipers killed a group of our wounded. 💬 Another illusion of the partners that Moscow wants peace must be shattered. Only by joint power, and not by playing along, can you make the bastards sit down for...
description_uk: 🤬 Кацапи вбили українську евакуаційну групу поблизу Гуляйпільського 🔄 Незважаючи на так зване "припинення вогню", ворог продовжує те, що і робив. Сьогодні близько 17:30 поблизу Гуляйпілського, з використанням fpv-дронів кацапи вбили групу наших поранених. 💬 Чергові ілюзії партнерів, що москаль хоче миру, мають бути розбиті. Лише спільною силою, а не підіграванням, можна змусити виродків сісти за...

title: Crimea: Attack attack
description: Ukraine strikes oil facilities in Russia, occupied Crimea. Ukrainian armed forces said they struck two oil facilities overnight on April 11, targeting the Krymskaya oil pumping station in Russia's Krasnodar Krai and the Gvardiyskaya oil depot in occupied Crimea.
description_en: Ukraine strikes oil facilities in Russia, occupied Crimea. Ukrainian armed forces said they struck two oil facilities overnight on April 11, targeting the Krymskaya oil pumping station in Russia's Krasnodar Krai and the Gvardiyskaya oil depot in occupied Crimea.
description_uk: Ukraine strikes oil facilities in Russia, occupied Crimea. Ukrainian armed forces said they struck two oil facilities overnight on April 11, targeting the Krymskaya oil pumping station in Russia's Krasnodar Krai and the Gvardiyskaya oil depot in occupied Crimea.

description: We are working with partners to move forward in negotiations and in guaranteeing security. Ukraine remains in constant contact with the American side at various levels. We are preparing very active work in the coming weeks with our European partners as well. On Monday, there will be a detailed report from Rustem Umerov on all agreements in the Middle East, the Gulf, and other countries...

title: Kramatorsk: Airstrike attack
description: Russian airstrike injures at least 10 in Donetsk Oblast. Russian troops dropped three glide bombs on the city of Kramatorsk in Donetsk Oblast on April 11, injuring at least 10 people, Governor Vadym Filashkin said.
description_en: Russian airstrike injures at least 10 in Donetsk Oblast. Russian troops dropped three glide bombs on the city of Kramatorsk in Donetsk Oblast on April 11, injuring at least 10 people, Governor Vadym Filashkin said.
